ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "vacation_total" INTEGER /* Total vacation days allotted to the employee */,
  "vacation_used" INTEGER /* Total vacation days used by the employee */,
  "sick_total" INTEGER /* Total sick days allotted to the employee */,
  "sick_used" INTEGER /* Total sick days used by the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the employee making the request */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leave request was created */,
  "leave_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "leave_days" INTEGER /* Number of days requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., Vacation, Sick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "max_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for this leave type */,
  "carry_over" INTEGER /* Whether the leave type allows carryover to the next year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the employee whose balances are tracked */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave type */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Current balance of the leave type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balances were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave request being approved */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the approver (usually a manager) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the approver regarding the decision */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_approvals_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_approvals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the organization (e.g., employee, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave policy */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave type */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_policies_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_request_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical leave request entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the employee */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the leave type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_request_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_request_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_request_history_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)
